55: You see, until we figured out how to make a repellent out of bitter-smelling juices, those popotoes would wreak havoc on our crops, eat our rroneek.... They even tried to take a bite out of more than one of the residents!

You see, until we figured out how to make a repellent out of bitter-smelling juices, those popotoes would wreak havoc on our crops, eat our rroneek... They even tried to take a bite out of more than one of the residents!
